Meta.title: Drug Shortages Switzerland | engpass.radar
Meta.description: All current drug shortages in Switzerland — updated daily from drugshortage.ch and BWL. Search by active substance, manufacturer or ATC code. Free, no login required.
Meta.ogDescription: Daily Swiss drug shortages — severity score, alternatives, ATC filter. Sourced from drugshortage.ch, BWL and ODDB.
Meta.twitterDescription: Up-to-date shortages, severity scores and alternatives. Free, no login.

StructuredData.siteDescription: Current drug shortages in Switzerland — updated daily.

Header.donateBody: engpass.radar is free and independent. Your donation helps cover servers, data and continued development.

Hero.sourcesLabel: Synced today · drugshortage.ch · BWL · USB Basel · ODDB
Hero.headline: medicines in Switzerland are currently reported as unavailable.
Hero.subline: Aggregated from drugshortage.ch, the BWL mandatory stockpile and the USB Basel list. Synced daily, publicly accessible.
Hero.searchPlaceholder: Active substance, brand name, ATC code or manufacturer

NotFound.body: The product or URL no longer exists — the shortage may have been resolved or the link is outdated.
